title: Write Launch Blog Post: 'Free AI Stem Separation: How StemScriber Works'
context: Write the first blog post for StemScriber's website. Target keyword: 'free stem separation tool 2026'. This should explain what stem separation is, how StemScriber works, and why it's different (cheaper than Moises, better jazz chord recognition, transposition). Include a clear CTA to try the free tier. Save to shared-workspace/content/blog/. Then create a task for Megaphone to distribute it.

data.audience: musicians who want to learn songs by ear
